table.title: Title
empty.welcome.title: Welcome to NexusM
empty.welcome.desc: Your media library is empty. Configure your media folders in NexusM.conf, then scan your library to get started.
empty.noRadio.title: No Radio Stations
empty.noRadio.desc: Radio stations configuration file not found or empty.
empty.noTv.title: No TV channels yet
empty.noTv.desc: Import an M3U playlist to get started.
empty.noMusic.title: Music library is empty
empty.noMusic.desc: Configure your music folders in NexusM.conf and scan your library from the Rescan Folders page.
empty.noAlbums.title: No albums found
empty.noAlbums.desc: Scan your music library to discover albums.
empty.noArtists.title: No artists found
empty.noArtists.desc: Scan your music library to discover artists.
empty.noSongs.title: No songs found
empty.noSongs.desc: Scan your music library to see all your songs.
empty.noGenres.title: No genres found
empty.noGenres.desc: Genre data is extracted from your music file tags.
empty.noTracks.title: No tracks found
empty.noTracks.desc: No tracks found for this selection.
empty.noFavourites.title: No favorites yet
empty.noFavourites.desc: Click the heart icon on any track, music video, movie, radio station, TV channel, or audio book to add it to your favorites.
empty.noPlaylists.title: No playlists yet
empty.noPlaylists.desc: Create your first playlist to organize your music.
empty.emptyPlaylist.title: Empty playlist
empty.emptyPlaylist.desc: Add tracks from the Songs page using the + button on song cards.
empty.noMostPlayed.title: Nothing played yet
empty.noMostPlayed.desc: Start listening to see your most played media across all types.
empty.noMusicVideos.title: No music videos found
empty.noMusicVideos.desc: Configure your music videos folders in NexusM.conf and scan from the Rescan Folders page.
empty.noEbooks.title: No eBooks found
empty.noEbooks.desc: Configure your eBooks folders in NexusM.conf and scan from the Rescan Folders page.
empty.noAudioBooks.title: No Audio Books found
empty.noAudioBooks.desc: Configure your Audio Books folder in Settings and scan from the Rescan Folders page.
empty.noVideos.title: No videos found
empty.noVideos.desc: Configure your movies/TV folders in NexusM.conf and scan from the Rescan Folders page.
empty.noPictures.title: No media found
empty.noPictures.desc: Configure your pictures folders in NexusM.conf and scan from the Rescan Folders page.
pictures.dragToAlbum: Drag photos or videos here to add them to the album
pictures.noPlacesDesc: Photos with GPS data will be grouped by city. Click 'Resolve Locations' to start.
empty.noResults.title: No results
cast.noDevices: No Cast device found by this browser. Your Google TV may be visible to phones but not this PC — close any VPN, use Google Chrome, and confirm the browser can cast (⋯ menu → Cast).
cast.failed: Could not start casting to that device.
cast.none: No Cast devices found on the network.
audioout.title: Audio output
audioout.needsHttps: Output-device selection needs a secure connection (HTTPS or localhost).
label.subject: Subject
label.author: Author
settings.resourceMonitorHint: Updates every 15 seconds — displays the last 3 hours of activity.
settings.httpsPortHint: NexusM will listen on this port for secure connections
settings.httpsRedirectHint: Automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS
settings.httpsDockerHostIPsHint: Docker only — enter your server's LAN IP address so the HTTPS certificate is trusted by browsers. Comma-separated for multiple IPs.
settings.httpsDockerHostIPsNotice: Only needed when running in Docker. NexusM cannot detect the host IP from inside a container.
settings.httpsCertNone: Not yet generated — enable HTTPS and restart
settings.httpsDownloadCertHint: Install on Apple TV: Settings → General → VPN & Device Management
settings.httpsRegenConfirm: Generate a new self-signed certificate? You will need to re-install it on all devices that currently trust the existing one.
settings.httpsCustomCertLabel: Custom Certificate (place your .pfx file in the folder below to use it instead of the auto-generated certificate)
settings.httpsCertPathHint: Place your custom .pfx certificate file here
settings.httpsCertPasswordHint: Only required for a custom .pfx certificate
settings.goBigDefaultHint: Automatically launch Go Big / TV Mode on startup
settings.uiTemplatesHint: Choose a custom layout template. Templates are CSS/JS files stored in wwwroot/templates/ — each folder is one template.
settings.traktGetAppKey: Register your app at trakt.tv/apps to get a Client ID and Client Secret.
settings.traktScrobbleHint: Automatically send playback events to Trakt.tv (start, pause, stop)
settings.traktPinInstruction: Open the link below and enter this code:
settings.traktConnecting: Waiting for you to authorize on Trakt.tv…
settings.dlnaEnabledHint: Expose library to DLNA clients on the LAN (Roku, smart TVs). Restart required.
settings.dlnaFriendlyNameHint: Name shown in DLNA device lists
settings.dockerNotice: Running inside Docker. To add a new folder, also add it as a volume mount in docker-compose.yml and run docker compose up -d (not restart) to recreate the container.
settings.savedFolderNotAccessibleDesc: Settings saved, but the following folder paths could not be found inside this process:
settings.dockerFolderWarningSteps:
You are running in Docker. Add the missing volume mount(s) to docker-compose.yml and recreate the container:

volumes:
{folders}

Then run:  cd /opt/nexusm && docker compose up -d
settings.dynamicCleanupHint: Automatically removes missing files from the database on a schedule — no full rescan needed.
settings.networkSharesHint: Configure SMB/CIFS network shares with credentials for remote media access.
confirm.deleteShare: Are you sure you want to delete this network share?
settings.fileExtensionsHint: Comma-separated list of file extensions to scan for each media type.
settings.metadataProvidersDesc: Fetch movie/TV metadata, posters, backdrops and cast photos from external providers.
settings.audioDirectPlayDesc: Serve audio files in their original format — ideal for SONOS and high-end audio systems. When disabled, ALAC files are transcoded for browser compatibility. AIFF is always transcoded for cross-platform support.
settings.audioDirectPlayWarning: ALAC files are served raw — may not play in standard web browsers.
settings.audioFallbackFormatDesc: Format used when transcoding ALAC files for browser playback.
settings.introSkipperHint: Shows a 'Skip Intro' button when chapter-tagged intro segments are detected in MKV/MP4 files
settings.ffmpegUpgradeHint: Missing required features — replace tools/ffmpeg/bin/ffmpeg with the NexusM custom build.
settings.hdrHint: Force SDR only if colors look washed out — Auto is much faster
settings.av1Better: AV1 — Better compression (Chrome / Firefox / Edge / Safari 17+)
settings.av1NoHw: No HW AV1 detected — falls back to H.264 GPU or SVT-AV1 CPU
settings.childSectionAccessHint: Choose which sections this child user can access
settings.ageRatingsHint: Allow content with these age ratings for this child
settings.viewingHoursHint: Restrict when this child can log in
settings.guestSectionAccessHint: Choose which sections this guest user can access
settings.subtitlesDesc: Configure subtitle providers. Subtitles are only downloaded when you manually request them on a video.
videoEdit.safeForChildrenHint: Always show to child users regardless of content rating
subtitle.configureFirst: Configure OpenSubtitles or SubDL API key in Settings first.
rescan.musicDesc: Scan all configured music folders for new, modified, or removed files.
rescan.picturesDesc: Scan all configured pictures/videos folders. Generates thumbnails, reads EXIF metadata, and indexes personal videos.
rescan.ebooksDesc: Scan all configured eBooks folders for PDF and EPUB files. Reads metadata (title, author, pages).
rescan.audioBooksDesc: Scan all configured Audio Books folders for MP3 and M4B files. Reads metadata (title, author, narrator, duration) and extracts cover art.
rescan.musicVideosDesc: Scan all configured music videos folders. Reads video metadata via FFprobe and generates thumbnails.
rescan.moviesTvDesc: Scan all configured movies/TV folders. Reads video metadata via FFprobe, detects movies and TV episodes, and generates thumbnails.
insights.title: Smart Insights
insights.comfortContentDesc: Content you keep coming back to — your most replayed titles.
insights.topRatedUnwatchedDesc: Highest rated content in your library that you haven't watched yet.
insights.howFeelingDesc: Select a mood and we'll recommend content that matches how you feel.
insights.noRecommendations: No recommendations found for this mood yet. Try adding more content to your library!
insights.msg.watchDays: You've spent approximately {0} days watching content!
insights.msg.watchHours: You've watched approximately {0} hours of content.
insights.msg.topGenre: Your most watched genre is {0} ({1} videos).
insights.msg.comfortTitle: "{0}" is your comfort content — played {1} times!
insights.msg.startWatching: Start watching content to build your viewing profile!
insights.unfinishedDesc: TV series you started but haven't finished.
insights.hiddenGemsDesc: Highly-rated classics from before 2005 you haven't discovered yet.
confirm.deletePlaylist: Delete this playlist? This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteUser: Delete user "{name}"? This will also remove their user database.
misc.noLyricsFound: No lyrics found for this track.
misc.couldNotFetchLyrics: Could not fetch lyrics. Check your connection.
misc.couldNotLoadEpub: Could not load EPUB. Try downloading the file instead.
actors.populateHint: Your actors database is empty. Click below to scan your existing movie and TV show metadata to build the actors database. This requires a TMDB API key.
actors.populatingHint: Scanning your library and fetching actor data from TMDB. This may take a few minutes...
login.viewingHoursMessage: You are only allowed to log in between
modal.restartRequired: To apply most changes, NexusM needs to be restarted.
anime.noAnime: No anime found. Configure your Anime folder in Settings and run a scan.
autoplaylists.selectHint: Select the types of playlists to generate from your library, then click Generate.
autoplaylists.decadeDesc: One playlist per decade based on your tracks' year tags
autoplaylists.recentDesc: Tracks added to your library in the last 90 days
autoplaylists.favouritesDesc: All your favourite tracks in one playlist
autoplaylists.noDecades: No year data found in your library
newreleases.title: What's New Online?
newreleases.noApiKeyDesc: Add your TMDB API key in Settings to use this feature.
watchmode.title: Where to Watch?
watchmode.noKeyDesc: Add your free Watchmode API key in Settings to search streaming platforms.
watchmode.clickForSources: Click a title to see where to watch it
watchmode.noSources: Not found on any streaming platform in this region
watchmode.rateLimit: API rate limit reached — try again later
fanart.hint: Pick a poster and/or backdrop, then Save Changes to apply.
fanart.noneArtist: No fanart.tv images found for this artist.
fanart.noKey: Add a fanart.tv API key in Settings to use this.
fanart.none: No fanart.tv images found for this title.
welcome.title: Welcome to NexusM
welcome.gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
welcome.gettingStarted.step1: Go to Settings → Media Shares and add your media folder paths (music, movies, pictures, etc.)
welcome.gettingStarted.step2: Open Rescan Folders and run a full scan for each library type.
welcome.gettingStarted.step3: Your media will appear in the library once the scan is complete.
welcome.feedback.title: Share Your Feedback
welcome.feedback.desc: Found a bug? Have a feature request or idea? We'd love to hear from you — no email required, completely anonymous.
playlist.import.title: Import Playlist
playlist.import.hint: Tracks are matched by file path, filename, or title & artist. Only tracks already in your library will be added.
playlist.import.noneMatched: No matching tracks found in your library.
catSettings.title: Manage My Music Folders
catSettings.hint: Excluded folders are hidden from All Tracks, shuffle and playlists. You can still browse them directly by clicking on them.
catSettings.excludedHint: This folder is excluded from your main library and shuffle.
catSettings.noFolders: No folder categories detected. Run a library scan first.
catSettings.hiddenCatsHint: Checked folders will be completely hidden for this user. They won't appear in any library view.
customGenres.title: Custom Genres
customGenres.name: Genre Name
customGenres.namePlaceholder: e.g. Road Trip, Party Mix, Classics...
customGenres.rulesHint: Items matching ANY selected genre or folder will appear in this custom genre.
customGenres.deleteConfirm: Delete this custom genre? This cannot be undone.
customGenres.empty: No custom genres yet. Click + to create one.
customGenres.hiddenHint: Checked custom genres will be completely hidden for this user across all views.
customGenres.assignHint: This video will appear in the checked custom genres regardless of their genre rules.
empty.noWatchlist.title: Your Watchlist is empty
empty.noWatchlist.desc: Use the ⋮ menu on any video to add it to your Watchlist.
videomenu.deleteSeriesConfirm1:
Permanently DELETE this ENTIRE TV show?

"{title}"

This deletes ALL {count} episode file(s) from your disk AND all of the show's metadata. This CANNOT be undone.
videomenu.deleteMediaConfirm1:
Permanently DELETE this media?

"{title}"

This deletes the actual FILE from your disk AND removes all of its metadata from the NexusM databases. This CANNOT be undone.
videomenu.deleteMediaWarn: This permanently deletes the file from disk and all related metadata. This action cannot be undone.
analysis.deepScanResetConfirm: Reset deep analysis for all files? This will re-probe all videos on the next scan.
analysis.deepScanNoFfprobe: ffprobe is not available. Configure FFmpeg in Settings to enable deep analysis.
analysis.duplicatesDesc: Scans your entire library for files with matching titles across all media types. TV episodes are only flagged when they share the same series, season, and episode number. Works only on files already scanned, reads your database data, not your shares.
analysis.duplicatesNone: No duplicates found — your library looks clean!
analysis.duplicatesDeleteConfirm1:
Permanently DELETE {count} selected duplicate file(s)?

This deletes the actual FILES from your disk AND removes all of their metadata from the NexusM databases. This CANNOT be undone.
settings.videoPreviewsHint: Generate 20-second preview clips for featured movies and shows in the Netflux hero banner. Clips are cached permanently in assets/vpreviews/ (H.264 MP4, max 1080p). Enable and run the scan to build the cache gradually.
settings.videoPreviewsNotStarted: Not started — click Start Scan to generate previews
settings.videoThumbnailsHint: Generate sprite sheets when opening a video, enabling thumbnail previews when hovering the seek bar below the player. Sprites are cached in assets/vthumbs/.
settings.deepScanHint: Background ffprobe pass on each video file to collect multi-track audio/subtitle details, video profile, colour space, and total bitrate. Low CPU impact.
settings.deepScanDelayHint: ms between each file (higher = less CPU pressure)
settings.systemPowerDesc: Shut down or restart the host machine running the NexusM server.
settings.scrobblingHint: Scrobbling sends your listening history to Last.fm and/or ListenBrainz. A track is scrobbled after 50% playback or 4 minutes, whichever comes first (tracks under 30 seconds are never scrobbled).
settings.scrobblingLastFmApiKeyHint: Get a free API key at last.fm/api/account/create
settings.scrobblingLbTokenHint: Paste your ListenBrainz user token from listenbrainz.org/profile/
artist.radioEmpty: No tracks found for Artist Radio
artist.similarNone: No similar artists found on Last.fm
rg.hint: Reads ReplayGain tags from your audio files and adjusts playback volume so every track plays at the same loudness. Requires a library re-scan to populate data for existing files. Toggle at any time using the RG button in the player bar.
rg.preampHint: -12 to +12 dB applied on top of the tag value
pictures.memoriesNoneDesc: Photos with dates will appear here
settings.remoteAccessDesc: Allow NexusM clients to connect to your server from outside your home network. Requires HTTPS to be enabled for secure connections. UPnP automatically opens a port on your router.
settings.remoteAccessCgNatDesc: Your ISP uses CGNAT (Carrier-Grade NAT). Port forwarding may not work. Consider a VPN or ask your ISP for a static IP.
settings.remoteAccessNoPairedDevices: No paired devices yet. Add a device below to generate a QR code for pairing.
settings.remoteAccessDisabledHint: Enable remote access above to manage paired devices.
settings.remoteAccessCgNatAlert: Remote access enabled, but CGNAT was detected. Your ISP may not allow incoming connections. Check the Remote Access section for details.
settings.remoteAccessNoUPnPAlert: Remote access enabled. UPnP port mapping was not set up automatically — you may need to configure port forwarding manually on your router.
settings.remoteAccessDisableConfirm: Disable remote access? Paired devices will no longer be able to connect.
settings.remoteAccessRevokeConfirm: Revoke access for "{label}"? This device will no longer be able to connect.
settings.remoteAccessQrInstructions: Scan with your NexusM mobile app to pair this device
settings.remoteAccessQrWarning: Keep this QR code private — it grants access to your media library
settings.remoteAccessHttpsRequired: Remote Access requires HTTPS to be enabled with a valid certificate. Go to Settings → HTTPS / TLS to configure it first.
gate.subtitle: External access only • LAN always bypasses
gate.description: Anyone connecting from outside your home network must enter a private invite code before the NexusM login page is shown. Devices on your LAN are never affected.
gate.noCodes: No invite codes yet. Add one below.
gate.deleteConfirm:
Delete this invite code?

Anyone using it will lose remote access immediately.
gate.regenConfirm:
Generate a new code for this slot?

Anyone using the old code will lose access until they re-scan.
gate.addCodeExpiryHint: Leave blank for no expiry. Maximum 360 days from today.
gate.addCodeExpiryError: Expiry date cannot be more than 360 days from today.
gate.addCodeExpiryPastError: Expiry date cannot be in the past.
gate.qrSubtitle: Scan once — valid until the code expires
gate.qrFooter: Keep this QR private — it grants access to your server
relay.sectionDesc: Permanent public URL on nexusm.net — no port forwarding, no Cloudflare account. Your subdomain is derived from this machine's hardware ID and never changes.
relay.label: Relay
relay.urlHint: Permanent URL — derived from this machine's hardware ID, never changes. API & metadata are relayed. Media streams directly from your server.
relay.warnTitle: Streaming not available — your server is not reachable from the internet
relay.warnBody: The relay handles login, browsing and metadata — but media files (video, music) must be fetched directly from your server. The relay detected that your server cannot be reached on its external address.
relay.warnFixIntro: To fix this, choose one option:
relay.warnOpt1Desc: In your router, forward external port {port} to this machine's local IP on the same port. Then re-enable the relay so it re-checks.
relay.warnOpt2Desc: Go to Settings → Remote Access and click Enable Remote Access. NexusM will attempt to open the port automatically via UPnP.
relay.warnOpt3Desc: Use the Cloudflare Quick Tunnel above instead. It works behind any NAT or CGNAT with no router changes, though it is slightly slower.
relay.qrSubtitle: Permanent — scan to open from any device
relay.privacyNote: API traffic and session tokens transit nexusm.net — a free community relay run by NexusM. Your actual media files (audio, video) stream directly from your server and never touch the relay. No user data is logged, stored, or used. The only information we see and record for security reasons, is your IP address, timestamps and URLs presented to the relay. No user information or invite codes are seen. Always review your local log file RemoteAccess.log from your /logs folder to monitor who is accessing your server.
tunnel.downloadConsent.title: Download cloudflared?
tunnel.downloadConsent.body: NexusM will download cloudflared (~50 MB) from Cloudflare's official GitHub releases and run it on this server to create a temporary public HTTPS tunnel.
tunnel.downloadConsent.warning: NexusM does not verify the binary's checksum or code signature. Only proceed if you trust Cloudflare's official GitHub releases.
gate.qrTokenWarning: Treat this link like a password — anyone who receives it gains immediate access to your server until this code is regenerated or expires.
cf.sectionDesc: Creates a temporary public HTTPS URL (e.g. abc.trycloudflare.com) so you can reach NexusM from anywhere — no account, no router changes, no IPv6 needed. URL changes on each restart.
cf.freeWarningBody: Cloudflare's free Quick Tunnel is intended for development use only. Real-world throughput is throttled and latency is higher than a direct connection. Cloudflare's Terms of Service explicitly prohibit video streaming on the free tier. Users who stream video through this tunnel risk having their IP address banned by Cloudflare. For reliable remote video access, consider a VPN like Tailscale instead.
cf.phoneHint: Open on your phone — no certificate needed, Cloudflare provides HTTPS.
cf.qrSubtitle: No certificate needed — Cloudflare provides HTTPS
cf.qrFooter: URL changes each time the tunnel restarts
remote.gateWarningTitle: Access Gate is not set up.
cf.gateWarningBody: Your tunnel is publicly reachable with only your login password as protection.
relay.gateWarningBody: Your relay tunnel is publicly reachable with only your login password as protection.
gate.httpsWarningBody: Invite codes and authentication tokens will be sent over unencrypted HTTP — anyone on the network path can intercept them.
autoupdate.title: Auto-Updates
autoupdate.upToDate: You are running the latest version.
autoupdate.applyingReload: Applying update… This page will reload automatically when the new version is ready.
autoupdate.dockerNotice: Auto-update is not available for Docker installations. Use the standard Docker workflow to get the latest version:
autoupdate.dockerVolumesNote: Your media library and configuration are stored in Docker volumes and will not be affected by the update.
autoupdate.errorDiskSpace: Not enough disk space. At least 3× the package size must be free.
autoupdate.errorHash: Package verification failed (SHA256 mismatch). The download has been discarded.
autoupdate.errorDownload: Download failed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
autoupdate.errorApply: Failed to apply the update. Please check the server logs.
autoupdate.errorRollback: Rollback failed. Please check the server logs.
autoupdate.saveFirst: Save settings first to apply changes.
epg.title: Programme Guide
epg.noSchedule: No schedule available for this channel
epg.selectChannel: Select a channel from the list to see its schedule
epg.noSources: No EPG sources configured. Add one below or import an M3U playlist that includes an EPG URL.
epg.noChannelsWithEpg: No channels have matching EPG data
epg.settingsHint: EPG sources provide programme schedule data for your Internet TV channels. The URL is usually found in your IPTV provider's M3U playlist header and is auto-detected on import.
epg.settingsHint2: Free public sources: epg.pw covers many countries. Your IPTV provider may also include a guide URL in their M3U playlist — NexusM detects it automatically on import.
wizard.intro: Your self-hosted media server is ready. Let's set up your libraries in a few quick steps — or skip and configure everything from Settings later.
wizard.foldersDesc: Tell NexusM where your media is stored. Click Add Folder to browse. You can add more library types from Settings later.
wizard.tmdbDesc: Unlock movie & TV artwork, descriptions and ratings with a free TMDB key.
wizard.tmdbPlaceholder: Paste your TMDB API key here
wizard.tmdbAlreadySet: A TMDB key is already configured
wizard.tmdbError: Failed to save — check your key and try again
wizard.scanDesc: Index your media so it appears in NexusM. Scans run in the background — you can start using the app right away.
